title: Pandanus spurius
taxonomy: Pandanus spurius is classified as a species within the genus Pandanus, which is a part of the family Pandanaceae. The family Pandanaceae is a group of flowering plants that are native to tropical regions. Pandanus spurius is further classified under the order Pandanales and the clade angiosperms. The classification of Pandanus spurius is also related to the larger group of monocots. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its leaf arrangement and reproductive structures.
uses: Pandanus spurius, a plant native to tropical regions, has been found to possess various medicinal properties. Its leaves have been used in traditional medicine to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions.
